exclusion_criteria: secondary commentary with no direct access to the work or paper itself (primary_secondary_derived == derived)
atlas entries whose own record is insufficient to decide instantiate-vs-reference honestly
inclusion_criteria: catalogued in the pinned theory-atlas or works-atlas snapshot (corpora/model-collapse/{theory,works}-atlas.snapshot.json)
works-atlas candidates: own `clusters` array contains 7 ("AI self-consumption" per src/data/field/clusters.json) -- 15 entries, fixed before classification

theory-atlas candidates: fixed, disclosed keyword match over tags/summary/work ("model collapse", "model-collapse", "self-consuming", "self-consumption", "autophagy", "MAD", "curse of recursion") -- 3 entries, fixed before classification
provenance-verified per the atlas's own curation standard (primary_secondary_derived in {primary, secondary})
